# BP-142 positive variant: sqlx.In output reaches a Get call without Rebind.
lang: go
file: BP-142-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: sqlx-tx
---
package sample

import "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"

type User struct{}

func loadUser(tx *sqlx.Tx, id int) (User, error) {
	query, args, err := sqlx.In("SELECT id FROM users WHERE id IN (?)", []int{id})
	if err != nil {
		return User{}, err
	}
	var user User
	err = tx.Get(&user, query, args...)
	return user, err
}
